where.if: AND ( O.ORDERER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(O.ORDER_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR PD.PRODUCT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

mapper.sql: FROM ORDERS O LEFT JOIN DELIVERY D ON O.ORDER_ID = D.ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT S.DELIVERY_ID, S.DELIVERY_YN, S.DELIVERY_STATUS FROM STATUS S WHERE S.DNUM = ( SELECT MAX(S2.DNUM) FROM STATUS S2 WHERE S2.DELIVERY_ID = S.DELIVERY_ID ) ) ST ON D.DELIVERY_ID = ST.DELIVERY_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT X.ORDER_ID, X.PRODUCT_NAME, X.PRODUCT_PRICE, X.PRODUCT_PHOTO1, X.COMPANY_NAME, X.COMPANY_PHONE, X.COMPANY_ADDRESS FROM ( SELECT OD.ORDER_ID, P.PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1, C.COMPANY_NAME, C.COMPANY_PHONE, C.ADDRESS_ADDRESS AS COMPANY_ADDRESS, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY OD.ORDER_ID ORDER BY OD.DETAIL_ID) AS RN FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD JOIN PRODUCT P ON OD.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_CODE = C.COMPANY_CODE ) X WHERE X.RN = 1 ) PD ON O.ORDER_ID = PD.ORDER_ID
mapper.select:
SELECT O.ORDER_ID, O.ORDERER_NAME, O.ORDERER_PHONE, O.ORDER_TOTAL_PRICE, TO_CHAR(O.ORDER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ORDER_DATE_STR, O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN, NVL(O.CANCEL_STATUS, '') AS CANCEL_STATUS, CASE WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'PENDING' THEN '취소요청' WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'APPROVED' THEN '취소완료' WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'REJECTED' THEN '취소거절' ELSE '정상' END AS CANCEL_STATUS_LABEL, NVL(ST.DELIVERY_YN, 'N') AS DELIVERY_YN, NVL(ST.DELIVERY_STATUS, '준비중') AS DELIVERY_STATUS, CASE WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'PENDING' THEN '취소 요청' WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'APPROVED' THEN '취소 완료' WHEN O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN = 'Y' AND O.CANCEL_STATUS = 'REJECTED' THEN '취소 반려' WHEN ST.DELIVERY_YN = 'Y' THEN '배송완료' WHEN ST.DELIVERY_STATUS = '배송중' THEN '배송 중' ELSE '결제 완료' END AS ORDER_STATUS_LABEL, NVL(D.DELIVERY_ID, 0) AS DELIVERY_ID, TO_CHAR(D.EXPECTED_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EXPECTED_DATE_STR, O.RECV_NAME, O.RECV_PHONE, O.RECV_ADDRESS, NVL(PD.PRODUCT_NAME, '상품 정보 없음') AS PRODUCT_NAME, NVL(PD.PRODUCT_PRICE, 0) AS PRODUCT_PRICE, PD.PRODUCT_PHOTO1, PD.COMPANY_NAME, PD.COMPANY_PHONE, PD.COMPANY_ADDRESS
ORDER BY O.ORDER_DATE DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DELIVERY ( DELIVERY_ID, ORDER_ID, COURIER, EXPECTED_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_DELIVERY.NEXTVAL, #{orderId}, NULL, NULL )
INSERT INTO STATUS ( DNUM, DELIVERY_YN, DELIVERY_STATUS, DELIVERY_ID ) VALUES ( RAWTOHEX(SYS_GUID()), #{deliveryYn}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{deliveryId} )
